locations.name: 秘鲁
locations.summary: 秘（bì）魯共和國（西班牙語：República del Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw Ripuwlika；艾馬拉語：Piruwxa Ripuwlika），通称秘魯（西班牙語：Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw；艾馬拉語：Piruw），是南…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

locations.name: 亞馬遜雨林
locations.summary: 亞馬遜雨林（葡萄牙語：Amazônia、西班牙語：Amazonia），又稱亞馬遜河雨林，位於南美洲亞馬遜盆地的熱帶雨林，佔地僅存約500萬平方公里，使這片雨林生機盎然的就是亞馬遜河。雨林橫越了8個國家：巴西（佔森林60%面積）、哥倫比亞、…

relations.subject: Amazonian pygmy owl
relations.evidence: The Amazonian pygmy owl (Glaucidium hardyi), also known as Hardy's pygmy owl, is an owl found in northern South America and the Amazon Basin

relations.subject: Amazonian pygmy owl
relations.evidence: The Amazonian pygmy owl (Glaucidium hardyi), also known as Hardy's pygmy owl, is an owl found in northern South America and the Amazon Basin

relations.subject: Amazonian pygmy owl
relations.evidence: The Amazonian pygmy owl occurs in the central and southwestern areas of the Amazonia region

relations.subject: Amazonian pygmy owl
relations.evidence: The population size has not been quantified. Research has shown canopy loss and fragmentation in the Amazon basin due to selective logging. As a canopy-dweller, the Amazonian pygmy owl is likely affected by these changes
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
